untranslatable_reason: Triple top pattern detection requires multi-bar pattern recognition logic not available in provided indicator set. The signal requires identifying three peaks at similar levels and two support levels between them, which cannot be expressed as simple price/indicator comparisons. Manual pattern detection or custom pattern indicator needed.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using Pivot points (s1 as initial support, s2 as profit target), but this does not capture the triple top formation requirement. The core pattern detection (three tops, two support levels, lower support selection) requires pattern analysis beyond standard technical indicators. Entry signal references 'support level at 8.20' and exit references height projection (e.g., from 10.75 top), suggesting absolute price levels or manual calculation—both outside the scope of provided indicators.
